frontmatter.title: C++ Speed in Node.js (N-API)
frontmatter.description: A tech talk and template exploring how to call fast C++ from Node.js through N-API, so time-sensitive work runs at native speed while keeping Node's event loop.
frontmatter.bannercaption: Same algorithm, native speed, called straight from Node
